What????? YOUR HONOUR CAN I NOT REFRENCE SOMETHING IN THE PAST???? DO I SERIOUSLY NEED TO EMPHASIZE HIM BEING 22??? URAWHHWHA 😭😭

I will FOREVWR be salty, man. But like, maybe it was an automatic flag???? Whatever.

Anyways, anyone ready for awakened hollyberry? I am honestly only excited for sugarfly cookie. I want another WIFE.
